description: Perform a daily morning triage of the DevOps team inbox containing 50 unread emails from various mailing lists. Create a folder named 'Priority-Queue' and move at least 5 actionable emails (questions, bugs, or patches) into it. Identify and star at least 3 important but non-urgent emails in the inbox for later review. Compose a morning briefing email to 'standup@devops-team.org' with the subject 'Morning Digest' listing the key items moved to the priority queue and their source mailing lists (e.g., SAdev, ILUG).
